title: Corrective fix for B-51f54bba-test: Test Add commit.gpgsign=false to remaining direct git-init test helpers
description:
Blocked reason: tests/test_config_wiring_phase3.py::TestDependencyValidationAndRuntimeResilience::test_scheduler_skips_corrupt_ready_bead_with_missing_dependency hangs indefinitely in pathlib.glob.scandir during Scheduler.run_once(). The hang occurs on the second _reevaluate_blocked() call after a ThreadPoolExecutor dispatches and completes a task. tests/test_config_wiring_phase3.py is missing RepositoryStorage._auto_commit = False at module level (unlike all other test files), which may be a contributing factor. This is a pre-existing defect exposed by the B-51f54bba fix.

Remaining work: One test hangs: tests/test_config_wiring_phase3.py::TestDependencyValidationAndRuntimeResilience::test_scheduler_skips_corrupt_ready_bead_with_missing_dependency. The hang is in Python 3.14 pathlib.glob.scandir during the second _reevaluate_blocked() call inside run_once(), triggered after a ThreadPoolExecutor worker completes. Requires a developer fix — likely adding RepositoryStorage._auto_commit = False at module level in test_config_wiring_phase3.py, or investigating the Python 3.14 glob/ThreadPoolExecutor interaction.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-51f54bba-test.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
conflict_risks: None — no production files changed by the tester.
